headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 10, 2026**
article:
The Washington Nationals suffered a 5-2 loss to the Miami Marlins, led by Heriberto Hernández's 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing an earned run.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Justin Verlander, who has been transferred to the 60-day injured list due to left hip inflammation. Kerry Carpenter has been placed on the 10-day injured list with a left AC Joint Sprain. Edwin Díaz has been transferred to the 60-day injured list with right elbow loose bodies.

The San Francisco Giants made a key trade addition, acquiring LHP Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for C Patrick Bailey. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall to Marlins in 5-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dropped a 5-2 decision to the Miami Marlins, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi pitched a strong 0.2 innings in relief, striking out 2 batters without allowing an earned run.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Athletics 2-1**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a narrow 2-1 victory over the Athletics, with Gunnar Henderson leading the team's offense with 2 hits and 1 RBI. Chris Bassitt earned the win for the Orioles, pitching 6 strong innings with 6 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Red Sox 4-1**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Bryan Baker closed out the game with a save.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Phillies in Blowout**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 6-0 loss to the Philadelphia Phillies, with Cristopher Sánchez earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts and 0 earned runs. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with 3 hits, including 2 home runs.

top_news.title: **Verlander Shifts to 60-Day IL**
top_news.summary: Justin Verlander has been transferred from the 15-day injured list to the 60-day injured list due to left hip inflammation. The Detroit Tigers pitcher will be sidelined for an extended period.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Key Trade Addition**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants acquired LHP Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for C Patrick Bailey on May 9, 2026. Wilkinson joins the Giants in a trade that brings new pitching depth to the team.
